'''âf-z-s-d''' ('''kafazsedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarnover|yarnover]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarnover|yarnover]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-z-s-d
|-
! Lemma
| kafazsedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifazsedoko|thifazsedoko]] || [[word:jifazsedoko|jifazsedoko]] || [[word:shifazsedoko|shifazsedoko]] || [[word:kifazsedoko|kifazsedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfazsedoko|thĂŠfazsedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfazsedoko|jĂŠfazsedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfazsedoko|shĂŠfazsedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfazsedoko|kĂŠfazsedoko]]

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafazsedoko|thafazsedoko]] || [[word:jafazsedoko|jafazsedoko]] || [[word:shafazsedoko|shafazsedoko]] || [[word:kafazsedoko|kafazsedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
